caption: A flashlight beam illuminates a dark, outdoor ground surface covered in dirt and scattered green vegetation. Initially, the light is blurred as it sweeps across the earth, eventually centering on a specific patch of ground. As the light stabilizes, it reveals a bright, circular focal point on the soil, surrounded by small plants and dry organic debris. The perspective remains a first-person point of view, looking straight down at the ground. There are no people, clothing, on-screen text, or logos visible in the scene. The only action is the movement and focusing of the light source, which transitions from a sweeping motion to a stationary, bright spotlight on the natural terrain.
